ref_classifications.reason: 正文明示「Carruthers 1966, table 2.1」，目標是外部參考書的表格，不是本書 chapter 2 的內部 table ref。
ref_classifications.evidence: raw PDF p.919 prints "they are tabulated in Carruthers 1966, table 2.1"; parsed catalogs only contain in-book table ids tbl-22.1 and tbl-22.1--1, with no tbl-2.1 target to repair.
